identity.name: Pasta Privato
identity.address: St. Lawrence (11 Church St, hidden behind Notte)

narrative.summary: 30-seat hidden pasta bar from Yannick Bigourdan & Chef Michael Angeloni. $125 tasting menu or à la carte. Tajarin with prosecco-butter & Kaluga caviar. Opens March 27. Intimate, intentional, serious pasta. Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.
